summary: Production-grade Monaco Editor + y-monaco + Yjs integration agent for Claude Code CLI

features.description: Create TypeScript type definitions for project detection (ProjectType, PackageManager, BuildTool)
features.verification: Types compile without errors, exported from src/types/index.ts

features.description: Create TypeScript interfaces for Monaco configuration (EditorOptions, ThemeConfig, LanguageConfig)
features.verification: Types compile without errors, match Monaco Editor API

features.description: Create TypeScript interfaces for Yjs integration (YjsProviderConfig, MonacoBindingOptions, AwarenessState)
features.verification: Types compile without errors, match Yjs/y-monaco API

features.description: Create TypeScript interfaces for agent output (IntegrationReport, ValidationResult, GeneratedFile)
features.verification: Types compile without errors, exported from src/types/index.ts

features.description: Implement detectPackageManager() utility to identify npm/pnpm/yarn from lockfiles
features.verification: Unit tests pass for all package managers, handles missing lockfiles

features.description: Implement detectBuildTool() utility to identify Next.js/Vite/CRA/Webpack from config files
features.verification: Unit tests pass for all build tools, handles unknown projects

features.description: Implement detectReactVersion() utility to parse React version from package.json
features.verification: Unit tests pass, returns null for non-React projects

features.description: Implement detectExistingMonaco() utility to check for existing Monaco/Yjs dependencies
features.verification: Unit tests pass, identifies version conflicts

features.description: Create Next.js config generator with MonacoWebpackPlugin setup
features.verification: Generated config is valid JavaScript, includes all required settings

features.description: Create Vite config generator with monaco-editor plugin setup
features.verification: Generated config is valid TypeScript, includes optimizeDeps

features.description: Create CSP headers generator for Monaco worker requirements
features.verification: Generated CSP includes worker-src, script-src with wasm-unsafe-eval

features.description: Create MonacoEditor.tsx component template with Yjs binding
features.verification: Template compiles, includes 'use client' directive, proper cleanup

features.verification: Template compiles, handles connection/disconnection, exposes awareness

features.description: Create useYjsDocument.ts hook template for per-file document management
features.verification: Template compiles, properly manages Y.Doc lifecycle

features.verification: Template compiles, properly cleans up MonacoBinding on unmount

features.description: Create editorOptions.ts config template with production defaults
features.verification: Template compiles, includes accessibility options

features.description: Create theme.ts template with dark/light theme definitions
features.verification: Template compiles, themes are valid Monaco theme objects

features.description: Create languages.ts template with file extension to language mapping
features.verification: Template compiles, covers Python/XML/JS/TS/JSON/CSS/MD

features.description: Create WebSocket connection error handling template with retry logic
features.verification: Template includes exponential backoff, max retries, error callbacks

features.description: Create Monaco loading error boundary component template
features.verification: Template renders fallback UI, reports errors, allows retry

features.description: Create Yjs sync conflict resolution template
features.verification: Template handles CRDT merge conflicts gracefully

features.description: Create lazy loading wrapper for Monaco Editor component
features.verification: Template uses dynamic import, shows skeleton during load

features.description: Document bundle size optimization strategies
features.verification: Documentation covers language subsetting, feature removal, code splitting

features.description: Create large file handling utilities with size limits and warnings
features.verification: Utility detects files >1MB, provides user warnings

features.description: Add WebSocket connection failure example to agent definition
features.verification: Agent includes example with retry logic and user feedback

features.description: Add failure case templates to agent Output Format section
features.verification: Agent includes FAILURE output template with error details

features.description: Add performance considerations section to agent definition
features.verification: Agent documents bundle size, lazy loading, large file handling

features.description: Add rate limits and WebSocket connection management to agent

features.verification: Command file exists in .claude/commands/, follows spec format

features.description: Create README.md with quick start, installation, and usage examples

features.description: Create ARCHITECTURE.md documenting package structure and design decisions
features.verification: Document covers all directories, explains design rationale

features.verification: Document covers SSR errors, worker issues, bundle size, Yjs sync

features.description: Create unit tests for project detection utilities
features.verification: Tests cover all package managers and build tools, achieve >80% coverage

features.description: Run full validation suite and verify quality score >= 8.0
